text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head over to the cafeteria for dinner and notice
a crowd. In the middle of the rabble is...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, you're the trainer from before! ☆ Yo,
yo, yo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I was just sharing pictures from the pajama party
with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text:
Just hearing about the party is so much fun! Ugh,
I wish I was in Ritto Dorm too!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's stopping ya?! You should just pop
on by! We'll have another bash with everyone
here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A party...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hey, Rice! You should come to the party too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, no... I can't... I'll bring bad luck if I go...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bad luck?! No cap?! No way, are we talking, like,
urban legends and—

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Helios! Look out! There's a banana peel at
your fe—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slip! THUD!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Owwww, I slipped on a banana peel!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I-I'm so sorry! I knew it... It's all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What? Wait, this is what you meant? Like, for real for real? That's so... so...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: So cool! I'm totally gagged!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! C-c-c-cool?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: That's literally a superpower! What's gonna happen next?! I'm so hyped!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it's not a good thing! I'm sure that whatever
happens next will be even worse...

text_block_list.name: Kitchen Staff
text_block_list.text: Ah, I slipped! My bucket! Watch oooout!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yikes! There's a bucket comin' at me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yikes! There's a bucket comin' at me!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Say less!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish... Splooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Nice dodge, Helios!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow... Y-you're incredible...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I know, right?! When it comes to running
away, I'm next level. ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: But for real, you totally need to come to our party! It'll be a total rager with you there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
D-do you really mean that? Is it okay for me to
come?
choice_data_list: Helios will be there too, so I'm sure it'll be fine.
Helios will be there too, so I'm sure it'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yes yes yes! Leave it to me! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... W-woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thoink! SPLOOOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gah, I botched that so bad! Now I'm soaked!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I-I'm so sorry! I knew it... I'm just plain—

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hilarious! I'm weak!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Talk about a drip! OMG, this is just like a summer festival!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Y-you're soaking wet... but you're not
mad?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Mad?! I'm totes vibing! Like, imagine if we did this
at a party. It would be so fire!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon, join me and the gang at our place!
Legit though, I'd be super stocked!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gosh... O-okay! I'd be stoked as well!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Going in for the catch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swoosh... Doink!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Gah! I caught it with my face!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww, I'm so, so sorry! See, having me at the party is a bad idea...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Why?! Unexpected things like these are fire! I'll make sure I catch it next time!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Why don't we do this at the party?! It would
totally be lit! ☆

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
OMG, I totally see it! We could even prep other
fun stuff too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, are... are you sure? You really don't mind my
bad luck?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Nope, sure don't! We're like, totally on the same
wavelength! This party's gonna be a total rager!
You with me?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'm with you!
